installCommand: echo 'no-op install (rust toolchain bootstraps in buildCommand)'
buildCommand: curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable --profile minimal && . "$HOME/.cargo/env" && rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown && cargo install --locked --version 0.21.5 trunk && trunk build --release
